---
name: Feature or improvement
about: Suggest a change to the workflow, the docs, or the package structure
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Problem / motivation**
What's missing or awkward today, and who it affects.

**Proposed change**
What you'd like to see. Keep in mind the ground rules in `CONTRIBUTING.md` — the core stays
generic, every fact has one home, and nothing assumes code or one kind of work.

**Which part it affects**
The core — the `handoff.core.md` spine or a `flows/` file (Create / Resume / Status / Close) — and
its section; a binding; the config schema; an agent stub; or docs.

**Alternatives considered**
Optional — other approaches you weighed and why this one.
